license_or_terms: Community Data License Agreement - Permissive variant for LILA Snapshot Serengeti distribution.
citation: Swanson, A. B., Kosmala, M., Lintott, C. J., Simpson, R. J., Smith, A., & Packer, C. (2015). Snapshot Serengeti, high-frequency annotated camera trap images of 40 mammalian species in an African savanna. Scientific Data, 2, 150026. LILA dataset page: https://lila.science/datasets/snapshot-serengeti
download_or_source_notes: Downloaded gold_standard_data.csv and raw_data_for_dryad.csv.zip from the LILA Snapshot Serengeti metadata addendum. Standardized only capture events present in expert gold.
notes_on_label_independence: Raw metadata has one record per unique user, capture event, and species. Multiple species rows from the same ClassificationID/UserID/CaptureEventID were collapsed into one sorted species-set label.
known_biases_or_filters: Primary analysis is restricted to the expert-gold subset. Species-set labels ignore count and behavior fields. Human labels may be present in metadata, consistent with LILA note that images were removed but metadata retains labels.
